description:
You are a constitutional law professor preparing a literature review. Your Jurism library contains several landmark U.S. Supreme Court cases. Create a standalone research memo note—a top-level note not attached to any specific reference—containing the following text exactly:

Research Memo: Constitutional Rights Framework

Key themes from landmark cases: Brown v. Board of Education (347 U.S. 483) established that equal protection prohibits racial segregation. Miranda v. Arizona (384 U.S. 436) established Fifth Amendment custodial interrogation safeguards. Gideon v. Wainwright (372 U.S. 335) extended the right to counsel to state proceedings. Together these cases form the foundation of modern constitutional rights jurisprudence.
